authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The article provides a detailed, practical guide to implementing Google AI Max in service business workflows, which aligns well with Google's helpful content guidelines.
Content demonstrates clear expertise through step-by-step implementation guides, specific KPIs, and business impact metrics which supports the helpful content criteria.
The article includes specific warnings about common mistakes and emphasizes human oversight, which is a positive signal for helpful content.
Use of structured data (key takeaways, checklists, troubleshooting) supports user comprehension and application, improving the practical value.
recommendedFixes: Add a clear visual (diagram or flowchart) showing the Slack-to-CRM workflow with AI Max triage to improve skimmability and practical understanding.
Include a numbered step-by-step checklist in the body content to reinforce the 'Implementation Checklist' section for better user experience.
Add a comparison table contrasting manual vs. automated workflows to highlight the business value proposition.
Include a 'Common Mistakes' section with specific examples to increase the depth and practical utility of the guide.
Add a 'Next Steps' section that clearly guides the reader to actionable implementation or consultation options to improve user engagement and conversion.
